--- path_variables_and_edge_subpaths.sql
p = ANY SHORTEST (a)->(b), shortest = (c), q = TRAIL PATHS (d), edge = (->)

--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphPattern{
  Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
    &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
      Variable: &ast.Ident{
        NameEnd: 1,
        Name:    "p",
      },
      SearchPrefix: &ast.GQLPathSearchPrefix{
        StartPos: 4,
        EndPos:   16,
        Prefix:   "ANY SHORTEST",
      },
      Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
        Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
          &ast.GQLPathTerm{
            Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
              Lparen:  17,
              Rparen:  19,
              Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                EmptyPos: -1,
                Variable: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 18,
                  NameEnd: 19,
                  Name:    "a",
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLPathTerm{
            Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
              StartPos:  20,
              EndPos:    22,
              Direction: "RIGHT",
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLPathTerm{
            Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
              Lparen:  22,
              Rparen:  24,
              Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                EmptyPos: -1,
                Variable: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 23,
                  NameEnd: 24,
                  Name:    "b",
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
    &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
      Variable: &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 27,
        NameEnd: 35,
        Name:    "shortest",
      },
      Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
        Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
          &ast.GQLPathTerm{
            Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
              Lparen:  38,
              Rparen:  40,
              Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                EmptyPos: -1,
                Variable: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 39,
                  NameEnd: 40,
                  Name:    "c",
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
    &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
      Variable: &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 43,
        NameEnd: 44,
        Name:    "q",
      },
      Mode: &ast.GQLPathModeClause{
        StartPos: 47,
        EndPos:   58,
        Mode:     "TRAIL",
        Suffix:   "PATHS",
      },
      Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
        Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
          &ast.GQLPathTerm{
            Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
              Lparen:  59,
              Rparen:  61,
              Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                EmptyPos: -1,
                Variable: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 60,
                  NameEnd: 61,
                  Name:    "d",
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
    &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
      Variable: &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 64,
        NameEnd: 68,
        Name:    "edge",
      },
      Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
        Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
          &ast.GQLPathTerm{
            Primary: &ast.GQLSubpathPattern{
              Lparen: 71,
              Rparen: 74,
              Path:   &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                  &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                    Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                      StartPos:  72,
                      EndPos:    74,
                      Direction: "RIGHT",
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
p = ANY SHORTEST (a)->(b), shortest = (c), q = TRAIL PATHS (d), edge = (->)
